# Chapter 13: Plasma physics for engineers  (~90 pp)
- 13.1 What plasma is: ionisation, Debye length, plasma frequency (12) · 13.2 Magnetised plasmas: cyclotron motion, drifts (12) · 13.3 Fluid models of plasma: MHD (12) · 13.4 Plasma diagnostics (10) · 13.5 Industrial plasmas: etching, CVD, lighting, propulsion (15) · 13.6 Fusion engineering: tokamaks, stellarators, inertial confinement (15) · 13.7 Failure section: plasma instabilities, disruption, sputtering (14)

**Archetype**: stability, transport, scaling. **Project**: characterise a plasma-globe discharge; estimate Debye length from observed structure. **Exercises**: 25.
